title: visitor-profile-builder profile.json
description: Intermediate data format shared by scripts/xlsx_to_profile_json.py, scripts/profile_json_to_xlsx.py and scripts/profile_json_to_html.py. This file is the single source of truth for the field contract — scripts/validate_profile.py reads it at runtime and both generators refuse to run on a profile that fails it. The 訪客信息 record is a CLOSED set of 10 fields; unknown keys are rejected. Fields with no data must hold the literal string '-'. Three keys (timestamp, note, sources) are presentation/metadata, not 欄位 — they render in the header/footer, never as a form row. Custom annotations: 'x-target' says which outputs a field reaches, 'x-role' marks field vs meta, 'x-soft-max' is an editorial ceiling that warns rather than errors. See references/field-contract.md.

timestamp.description: 彙整/更新時間，例如 2026/07/09。標頭時間戳，非欄位。

name_en.description: 姓名的英文部分，屬欄位[1]的一部分而非獨立欄位。xlsx 併入 B3 寫成『中文名（English）』，讀回時再拆開。

contact.description: [6] 聯繫方式，多筆用 ／ 分隔。放在最後是因為它是唯一會長到佔滿一行的欄位。無資料填 '-'

education.description: [7] 教育經歷，硬上限 5 列。每列四格，缺哪格就填 '-'

degree_level.description: 學歷：學士／碩士／博士 等

positions.description: [8] 現任職位，硬上限 3 個，依重要性由上到下排列；HTML 會將第一筆加粗顯示

career.description: [9] 主要履歷，硬上限 10 筆。每列三格，缺哪格就填 '-'

date.description: 起止年月，格式不拘但同一份 profile 內盡量一致

photos.description: [10] 照片，硬限制 0～2 張（版型只排得下兩張）。沒有照片就留空陣列，不要留空物件或假路徑。

path.description: 本機檔案路徑（產生時讀取後轉為 base64/嵌入圖片）

caption.description: 顯示於照片下方的簡短來源說明

source_url.description: 完整來源網址，一併寫入 sources

note.description: 備註／免責聲明，渲染於頁尾，非欄位。務必註明：(1) 資料彙整依據 (2) 推估內容未經官方佐證 (3) 照片來源與非官方性質

sources.description: 資料來源清單，渲染於頁尾，非欄位。所有事實依據的原始網址逐一列出，硬限制至少 1 筆。
